# 侧边栏图标 SVG 代码

## 1. 选择机型图标

### 主选择机型图标 (home)
```svg
<svg class="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0" viewBox="0 0 1024 1024" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <path d="M362.365 117V337.078C362.365 341.497 365.947 345.078 370.365 345.078H441.452M660.635 117V337.078C660.635 341.497 657.053 345.078 652.635 345.078H581.548M762.317 570.618H519.5C515.082 570.618 511.5 567.036 511.5 562.618V440.499M260.683 677.605H762.317M260.683 907V782.953C260.683 778.535 264.264 774.953 268.683 774.953H754.317C758.736 774.953 762.317 778.535 762.317 782.953V907M260.683 907H762.317M260.683 907H159M762.317 907H864M441.452 345.078H503.714H581.548M441.452 345.078V432.499C441.452 436.917 445.034 440.499 449.452 440.499H511.5M581.548 345.078V432.499C581.548 436.917 577.966 440.499 573.548 440.499H511.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="55" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
</svg>
```

### 旧版选择机型图标 (homeold)
```svg
<svg class="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
  <path d="M5 20h14a1 1 0 0 0 1-1V5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H5a1 1 0 0 0-1 1v14a1 1 0 0 0 1 1z" />

  <path d="M4 8h16" />
  <path d="M10 8v3l1 2h2l1-2V8H10z" />
</svg>
```
